info.name: InsureBook — Customer Mobile API
info.description:
All customer-facing mobile APIs for the InsureBook platform.

**Setup:**
1. Set `base_url` collection variable to your server (e.g. `https://your-domain.com`)
2. Call Login and copy the `token` from the response
3. Set `token` collection variable — all protected endpoints auto-use it

**Auth header:** `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Sections:**
1. Authentication
2. Customer — Portfolio & Insurance
3. Settings
4. Investments (Mutual Funds, Fixed Deposits, Other)
5. Taxation (ITR, Tax Planning)
6. Loans (Personal, Home, Mortgage, Business)
7. Travel (Domestic, International)
8. Credit Cards (Rewards, Business, Travel)
9. Common Error Responses
